zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralf de Taillebois於1019年出生在法國諾門迪奧內時，他的父親Raoul de Taillebois20歲，母親Ermengarde de Normandy23歲。他於1050年之前與Azeline Ries在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾惠特比被列為prior of whitby abbey。他去世於1075年在法國巴-諾門迪奧內塔爾波易斯享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralf de Taillebois于1019年出生在法国諾門迪奧內时，他的父亲Raoul de Taillebois20岁，母亲Ermengarde de Normandy23岁。他于1050年之前与Azeline Ries在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾惠特比被列为prior of whitby abbey。他去世于1075年在法国巴-諾門迪奧內塔爾波易斯享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ralf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralf de Taillebois was born in 1019, in Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Raoul de Taillebois, was 20 and his mother, Ermengarde de Normandy, was 23. He married Azeline Ries before 1050, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as prior of whitby abbey in Whitby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1075, in Taillebois, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralf de Taillebois est né en 1019, à Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Raoul de Taillebois, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Normandy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Azeline Ries avant 1050, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est prior of whitby abbey à Whitby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1075, à Taillebois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralf de Taillebois 1019 in Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul de Taillebois 20 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Normandy 23. Er hat vor 1050 in Normandie, Frankreich Azeline Ries geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als prior of whitby abbey in Whitby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1075 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Taillebois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralf de Taillebois è nato il nel 1019 nel Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul de Taillebois, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Normandy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Azeline Ries prima del 1050, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come prior of whitby abbey nel Whitby, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1075, nel Taillebois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralf de Tailleboisが1019年にフランスノーマンディオルンで生まれた時，父Raoul de Tailleboisは20歳，母Ermengarde de Normandyは23歳であった。1050年以前にフランスノーマンディでAzeline Riesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウィトビーでの職業はprior of whitby abbeyと記録されている。彼は1075年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンティイレボイスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralf de Taillebois(이)가 1019년 프랑스 노먼디 른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul de Taillebois(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Normandy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1050년 이전 프랑스 노먼디에서 Azeline Ries(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 휘트비에서 prior of whitby abbey이었다. 그는 1075년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 테이레보이스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Kendal Castle, Westmoreland: Kendal, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralf de Taillebois nasceu em 1019, em Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul de Taillebois, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Normandy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Azeline Ries antes 1050, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como prior of whitby abbey em Whitby, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1075, em Taillebois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralf de Taillebois родился в 1019 г. в местности орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul de Taillebois было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Normandy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Azeline Ries перед 1050 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии prior of whitby abbey в местности уитби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1075 г. в местности теиллебоис, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralf de Taillebois nació en 1019, en Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Raoul de Taillebois, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Normandy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Azeline Ries antes de 1050, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era prior of whitby abbey en Whitby, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1075, en Taillebois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
